error_message: explicit lifetime required in the type of `prog`
error_snippet:
|
64 | self.prog = prog;
   | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ lifetime `'a` required
   |
help: add explicit lifetime `'a` to the type of `prog`
   |
62 | pub fn run(&mut self, prog: &'a Program) -> RuntimeResult {
   |                              ++

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0621`.
